ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing AI risk management systems, including establishing governance frameworks aligned to organizational risk tolerance, defining roles and responsibilities, and creating decision structures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-001 (AI Governance/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.535, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.535). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 1. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Metadata management and catalog strategy: technical/business/operational metadata, catalog platforms, metadata standards, lineage capture, and metadata enrichment.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.535, and AI Governance (AG) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA for Metadata Manager?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance competencies do not appear as Metadata Manager requirements in job postings. They are allocated to specialist roles. Exclusion consistent with market patterns.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld by market evidence. AI Governance is not a Metadata Manager core competency. Final decision: exclude.
